## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New service integration
- [ ] New tool(s) on existing service

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New env vars are documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Tool descriptions are clear enough for an AI to understand when to call them
- [ ] Zod schemas validate all input before side effects
- [ ] Destructive tools are gated (confirmation, safety filter, or both)
